name: Demon Layer
descrip: A (probably) legendary whip blessed by the Goddess Venereae for the purpose of defeating monster girls with its holy powers. Its power scales with your virility up to 100%, then after that point it's half as effective.
outcome: [AttackerName] lashes out with Demon Layer, striking [TargetName] with a loud crack, making [TargetHimOrHer] cry out with ecstasy as holy magic reverberates through [TargetHimOrHer] body.
miss: [AttackerName] lashes out with Demon Layer, but misses [TargetName] entirely as [TargetHeOrShe] dodges it with ease!
